nasb.text: The one on whom seed was sown on the rocky places, this is the man who hears the word and immediately receives it with joy;

esv.text: As for what was sown on rocky ground, this is the one who hears the word and immediately receives it with joy,

cnv.text: 那撒在石地上的，就是人聽了道，立刻歡歡喜喜地接受，

ccb.text: 种子落在石头地上，是指人听了道后，立刻欢喜地接受了，

csbs.text: 那被撒上种子的‘岩石地’是这样的人：他听了这话语，立刻怀着喜乐的心接受了它；
